name: Zapier AI Inbound Email Parsing & CRM Sync
description: Monitors a dedicated sales inbox for unstructured inquiries, uses Zapier's built-in AI (or external LLM) to extract structured entity data (Name, Email, Vehicle, Intent), and securely pushes it to the Alba AI Platform. Includes fallback mechanisms if the AI parsing fails.

steps.purpose: Clean email body for AI parsing.

config.instructions: Extract the customer's full name, phone number, vehicle of interest, budget (if mentioned), and urgency (Low, Medium, High).

steps.purpose: Ensure it is an actual car inquiry, not spam.

onError.description: If Webhook fails (e.g. 500 error), trigger Zapier Manager to alert the DevOps team via SMS and create an Airtable bug report.

business_impact: Automates lead extraction from legacy channels (email) with human-level accuracy, preventing manual data entry errors and saving hours of administrative time.
